translations.Starter overview with sample KPIs and ac: Starter overview with sample KPIs and activity placeholders. Replace this view with your own data.
translations.Wire buttons here to create records, ope: Wire buttons here to create records, open lists, or deep links. Use the sidebar for Settings and Documentation.
translations.This app needs OpenRegister to store and: This app needs OpenRegister to store and manage data. Please install OpenRegister from the app store to get started.
translations.User settings will appear here in a futu: User settings will appear here in a future update.
translations.Information about the current OpenBuilt: Information about the current OpenBuilt installation
translations.No virtual apps yet — seed `hello-world`: No virtual apps yet — seed `hello-world` should appear after install.
translations.Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSO: Integrator-only editor: edit the raw JSON manifest below. The visual editor lives in a follow-on release (openbuilt-page-editor).
translations.Paste or edit the JSON manifest here. Se: Paste or edit the JSON manifest here. See @conduction/nextcloud-vue/src/schemas/app-manifest.schema.json for the canonical schema.
translations.No versions yet — publish this app to cr: No versions yet — publish this app to create the first snapshot.
translations.Rolling back copies this snapshot's mani: Rolling back copies this snapshot's manifest onto the current draft. Existing history is preserved (append-only).
Nothing to diff — publish the app first.
translations.No applications available — ask an owner: No applications available — ask an owner to grant you access.
translations.Configure which Nextcloud groups can vie: Configure which Nextcloud groups can view, edit, or own this virtual app. Members of any of these groups will see the app in their list; only owners may publish, archive, delete, transfer ownership, or change these permissions.
translations.At least one owner group is required — s: At least one owner group is required — saving with no owners would orphan this application.
translations.Editor or owner role required to save th: Editor or owner role required to save the manifest.
translations.Your access to this application was revo: Your access to this application was revoked. The list will refresh.
translations.Slug must be kebab-case (lowercase lette: Slug must be kebab-case (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens) and start with a letter.
translations.Title: Title
translations.A schema with this slug already exists i: A schema with this slug already exists in this app.
translations.Add your first schema to start designing: Add your first schema to start designing the data model for this app.
translations.You are about to remove the property {na: You are about to remove the property {name} from this schema. Existing objects of this schema may have data in this property that will become unreachable after Save.
translations.You are about to delete the schema {slug: You are about to delete the schema {slug}. All objects of this schema may be affected. Type the schema slug below to confirm.
translations.No schema with this slug exists in the c: No schema with this slug exists in the current virtual app.
translations.No fields yet. Add the first property to: No fields yet. Add the first property to your schema.
translations.Name: Name
translations.Name must start with a letter and use le: Name must start with a letter and use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens only.
Name must be unique within the schema.
translations.Declare states and transitions. Every ac: Declare states and transitions. Every action is a typed declarative record per ADR-031 — no free-text code.
translations.State slug must be kebab-case and unique: State slug must be kebab-case and unique.
translations.Label: Label
Exactly one initial state is required.
translations.Exactly one lifecycle state must be mark: Exactly one lifecycle state must be marked as initial before you can save.
translations.No widget catalogue registered yet — wid: No widget catalogue registered yet — widget IDs are free-text. The page editor (chain spec #5) will narrow this to a picker once it ships.
translations.The aggregation editor ships in v1.1 (se: The aggregation editor ships in v1.1 (see design Decision 7). Existing aggregations declared on this schema are shown read-only below.
No aggregations declared on this schema.
translations.The calculation editor ships in v1.1 (se: The calculation editor ships in v1.1 (see design Decision 7). Existing calculations declared on this schema are shown read-only below.
No calculations declared on this schema.
translations.The notification editor ships in v1.1 (s: The notification editor ships in v1.1 (see design Decision 7). Existing notifications declared on this schema are shown read-only below.
translations.No notifications declared on this schema: No notifications declared on this schema.
